message:
feat(dashboard): add resources view showing VMs, ZFS, TAP, DHCP

Add a Resources page that displays system resources grouped by type:
- VM directories from filesystem
- ZFS VM and workspace datasets
- TAP network interfaces
- DHCP leases from dnsmasq

The page highlights orphaned resources and suggests running 'stockyard gc'
to clean them up. Also fixes missing CreateTask and RestartTask methods
in DashboardFacade that were preventing the build.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
